title: Tesla Home: Home Energy Management, Powered by AI
summary:
Tesla Home comes standard with every Powerwall to automatically optimize your energy usage and help lower your electricity bills. Powered by Opticaster, our proven AI optimization software, it predicts your energy needs and adjusts usage across your home with no additional equipment needed.

Works with solar, storage, EV chargers and more. Set your energy goals in the Tesla app and let Tesla Home handle the rest.

Learn more: www.Tesla.com/tesla-home

title: How Tesla Vision Helps Deploy Airbags Earlier
summary:
Tesla Vision allows us to deploy airbags up to 70 milliseconds earlier if your Tesla detects an unavoidable collision.  Impact sensors will continue to make the final decision of when to deploy — the airbags will not deploy based on Tesla Vision alone.

This can be the difference between a serious injury & walking away from a crash
